comment.body: @ntnguyen1234 I believe this site is part of [Rogers Media](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/1b4dab773615715ec5737c85900a00a0ddbe2e5b/BaseFilter/sections/specific.txt#L21389). I also noticed many of the other domains seem to redirect to it. I didn't test them all, so I'm not sure whether they all do or only some.

issue.title: www.costcotravel.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.costcotravel.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.costcotravel.com%2F) ### Comment > Going to costcotravel.com, you can search for travel packages and it will be stuck in the endless loading loop. If you disable adguard, it will load normally and allow you to book. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/kf47u3085hwos0c404gwksskc4ss08obswip8z84og.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/7pcfbe1gdrsw4g4c8s4s40cs08840o4krkz0swh7vk.png?nc=1)

AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List

**Security:**

Block trackers,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Windows Tracking**:
Disable Windows Telemetry,
Turn off Advertising ID,
Disable Windows Recall DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | enabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)`
`Web of Trust (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-wot/1.0/wot.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.8+%285279%29&system_version=Microsoft+Windows+NT+10.0.19045.0&browser=firefox&filters=2.3.11.18.19.20.21.207.208&custom_filters=User%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.servers=quic%3A%2F%2F1s6wkjgnawd.dns.controld.com&userscripts=AdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Popup%2520Blocker%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fpopup-blocker%252F2.5%252Fpopupblocker.user.js%29%252C%250AWeb%2520of%2520Trust%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-wot%252F1.0%252Fwot.user.js%29&dns.filters=User%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=true&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.flash=false&stealth.java=false&stealth.strip_url=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=false&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=false&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&stealth.disable_wap_push_message_routing_service=false&stealth.disable_windows_defender=false&stealth.disable_windows_telemetry=true&stealth.turn_off_advertising_id=true&referrer=&win.wfp=false&license_type=paid&scheme_version=2&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=5000&dns.fallback_mode=None&stealth.disable_windows_recall=true)
